SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.elf.sections

Class ElfRelTable

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.elf.ElfSection
net.boricj.bft.elf.sections.ElfRelTable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<ElfRelTable.ElfRel>, Collection<ElfRelTable.ElfRel>, List<ElfRelTable.ElfRel>, SequencedCollection<ElfRelTable.ElfRel>, IndirectList<ElfRelTable.ElfRel>, Writable
public class ElfRelTable extends ElfSection implements IndirectList<ElfRelTable.ElfRel>
ELF relocation table section without explicit addends (REL format). Relocations specify how to adjust addresses during linking.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    ElfRelTable.ElfRel
    An ELF relocation entry without explicit addend.

    Description

    Creates a new relocation table with default settings.

  • Constructor Details

    • ElfRelTable

      public ElfRelTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSymbolTable symbolTable, ElfSection section)
      Creates a new relocation table with default settings.
      Parameters:
      elf - parent ELF file
      name - section name
      symbolTable - symbol table referenced by relocations
      section - section to which relocations apply

    • ElfRelTable

      public ElfRelTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long addralign, long entsize, ElfSymbolTable symbolTable, ElfSection section)
      Creates a new relocation table with specified settings.
      Parameters:
      elf - parent ELF file
      name - section name
      flags - section flags
      addr - section virtual address
      offset - section file offset
      addralign - section alignment
      entsize - entry size
      symbolTable - symbol table referenced by relocations
      section - section to which relocations apply

    • ElfRelTable

      public ElfRelTable(ElfFile elf, ElfFile.Parser parser, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long size, int link, int info, long addralign, long entsize) throws IOException
      Reads a relocation table from an ELF file.
      Parameters:
      elf - parent ELF file
      parser - ELF file parser
      flags - section flags
      addr - section virtual address
      offset - section file offset
      size - section size in bytes
      link - index of associated symbol table
      info - index of section to which relocations apply
      addralign - section alignment
      entsize - entry size
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • add

      public ElfRelTable.ElfRel add(long r_offset, ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol symbol, ElfRelocationType type)
      Adds a new relocation entry to this table.
      Parameters:
      r_offset - offset where relocation should be applied
      symbol - symbol referenced by this relocation
      type - relocation type
      Returns:
      the created relocation entry
